scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r src/web dist/web
scripts.test: sh -c 'if ! find dist -type f -name "*.test.js" -print -quit | grep -q .; then echo "No compiled tests found in dist/."; exit 1; fi; node --test "dist/**/*.test.js"'
scripts.test:ci: sh -c 'if ! find dist -type f -name "*.test.js" -print -quit | grep -q .; then echo "No compiled tests found in dist/."; exit 1; fi; node --test "dist/**/*.test.js"'
